title: Marketing Executive
description:
Company Overview

  • PPL Group, established in 2014, is a Singapore-based company specializing in corporate services. We focus on three core areas: corporate advisory and secretarial services, investment immigration, business travel and study abroad visa services, as well as labor dispatch. Our clientele includes SMEs and high-net-worth individuals from Singapore, China, and Japan. With years of experience in the industry, we are committed to providing efficient, high-quality services to help clients successfully establish and expand their businesses in Singapore and across Southeast Asia.

Job Summary

We are hiring a proactive and creative Marketing Executive to join our team. Candidates with 1–2 years of relevant marketing experience are preferred; however, fresh graduates with relevant skills and strong interest in marketing are welcome to apply.

Responsibilities

  • Collaborate in planning and executing marketing and promotional campaigns to increase brand visibility and engagement
  • Develop, edit, and publish marketing content across social media and digital platforms to drive audience interaction and lead generation
  • Apply basic photo editing skills to create compelling visuals for marketing materials, advertisements, and online content
  • Manage and update marketing information on websites, social media, and other channels to ensure accuracy and relevance
  • Support sales and internal teams by preparing marketing materials and assisting in campaign execution to enhance sales effectiveness
  • Monitor marketing activities and analyze campaign performance data to provide actionable insights for continuous improvement

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • 1–2 years of marketing-related experience or demonstrated relevant skills for fresh graduates
  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related fields
  • Basic photo editing skills for marketing purposes (e.g., social media visuals)
  • Interest in marketing, branding, and digital content creation
  • Strong communication skills with the ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team
  • Responsible, well-organized, and capable of managing multiple tasks simultaneously
  • Ability to read Chinese is preferred

Salary & Benefits $2,500 - $3,500. Salary will be commensurate with experience. Performance-based incentives and bonuses Career development and growth opportunities SP / EP application available
